detailed_camera_plan: Start with a wide shot of the stairs, tracking 秦嬴 as he descends. Camera moves from a full body view to a medium shot as he enters the dining room.
action_description: 秦嬴下楼进入餐厅，动作沉稳，目光扫视四周。
staging_description: 秦氏庄园餐厅内部，光线明亮，秦嬴从楼梯口步入餐厅区域。

character_poses.秦嬴: standing upright, walking forward with a purposeful gait

setting_details: Modern luxury villa dining room, 2013 interior design, marble flooring.
ending_composition_description: 秦嬴站在餐厅中央，身体微转，视线向上看向天花板角落。
